chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 2138 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. 10.01.2018. Syed Meeral Shah, A.P.G. for the State alongwith ASI Zameer Ahmed PS Taluka, Tando Muhammad Khan. = This is second call and it is 11-15 a.m. Neither the petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. This petition was filed on 19.07.2016. Since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is diligently pursuing this matter. Perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in this matter which is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
